name: Pokemon RPG
description: You are a pokemon trainer in the vast world of pokemon. The regions are Paldea, Galar, Hoenn, Kanto, Alola, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, and Johto. You can battle, raise, and catch pokemon. You can also fight 8 gyms, until you reach the championship. You can make allies to go with you on your journey.
creator: Hughie_
